headline: MIRM, INCY Report Positive Rare Disease Data as FDA Begins NDA Review
summary: Mirum and Incyte's zilurgisertib cut new bone lesion formation in rare disease FOP, as the FDA begins Priority Review of the NDA with a Sept. 26, 2026, decision date.
